title: Rubber Duck Review - Reviews File
description: Schema for the .vscode/reviews.json file used by the Rubber Duck Review VS Code extension.

commit.description: A git commit with its SHA and first line of message.

id.description: Full SHA (40-character hex string) of the commit.

message.description: First line of the commit message.

baseCommit.description: Base commit with SHA and first line of message, or null if no git repository or no base could be determined.

headCommit.description: HEAD commit with SHA and first line of message, or null if no commits exist.

hasUncommittedChanges.description: Whether the working tree had uncommitted changes when the review was created.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root, using forward slashes.

startLine.description: 1-based start line number of the commented range. Required for LINE comments, omitted for FILE comments.

endLine.description: 1-based end line number of the commented range. Required for LINE comments, omitted for FILE comments.

subjectType.description: Whether the comment is on a line range or file-level.

startColumn.description: 1-based start column (character offset + 1) of the commented range.

endColumn.description: 1-based end column (character offset + 1) of the commented range.

languageId.description: VS Code language identifier of the document at creation time (e.g. 'typescript', 'python').

body.description: Markdown body of the comment. May contain ```suggestion code fences.

snippet.description: The text snippet captured at the moment the comment was created.

symbol.description: Enclosing code symbol (function, method, class) captured from VS Code at creation time.

containerName.description: Enclosing container or parent symbol name (e.g. 'ReviewCommentController').

detail.description: Detail string or signature provided by VS Code.

startLine.description: 1-based start line of the enclosing symbol.

endLine.description: 1-based end line of the enclosing symbol.
